items.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
items.dek: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.
items.body: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
items.dek: US Navy Secretary John Phelan is the latest high-ranking military leader to leave the administration in recent months.
items.body: US Navy Secretary John Phelan is the latest high-ranking military leader to leave the administration in recent months.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Teenager found in singer D4vd's car died of 'multiple injuries'
items.dek: The medical examiner said the 14-year-old's cause of death was determined months ago but was blocked from release.
items.body: The medical examiner said the 14-year-old's cause of death was determined months ago but was blocked from release.
